title: [circt-verilog] Option '--l' of circt-verilog Has No Effect.

features.name: named port connection in gate-level module instantiation
features.description: Code should include module instantiation using named port connections (.port(signal) style) for gate-level cells such as NOT, NAND, NOR

features.name: verilog attribute annotation on module
features.description: Code should include Verilog attribute annotations using (* attr = val *) syntax on module declarations and port declarations

features.name: dual input and wire declaration for same port
features.description: Code should include a port declared redundantly as both an input direction and a wire net type in the same module body

features.name: DFF with posedge clock sequential element
features.description: Code should include a D flip-flop module with a posedge-triggered always block performing non-blocking assignment

features.name: DFFSR with asynchronous set and reset priority logic
features.description: Code should include a D flip-flop with synchronous clock and asynchronous set/reset in the sensitivity list, with priority-encoded if-else logic for set before reset before data

features.name: constant literal assignment to partial output port bit
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment that drives a single bit of a multi-bit output port to a constant literal value using a sized hex literal
